summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs #71154 and #71205 are routed to central security handling; already-closed #71589 is kept closed; all other open PRs remain non-mutating keep classifications because they are useful or plausible but not closeable from this cluster evidence.

actions.reason: Exec allowlist and approval behavior touches a documented trust boundary, and the hydrated artifact explicitly marks this PR security-sensitive.
State directory hardening opt-out affects filesystem permission posture and is explicitly marked security-sensitive in live preflight.
Useful Docker compatibility change, but independent from the other PRs and blocked from merge by dirty branch and missing real behavior proof.
Distinct useful session-state fix attempt, but not a duplicate/superseded/low-signal close candidate and not merge-ready.
Already closed; no mutation should be emitted for a closed PR.
Related to the memory embeddings issue family and contains unique work, but failing checks and missing proof block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Related implementation path for open issue #11960, but not merge-ready and not suitable for closure planning.
Independent Telegram/message-delivery change with useful direction but unresolved product/behavior risk and missing proof.
Strong related candidate for #22676, but dirty merge state and maintainer-review status make it a keep-related classification in this close-only plan.
Independent focused bug-fix attempt, but live evidence does not support closing, merging, or treating it as a canonical fix.
